message:
test(fuzz): add CBOR simple-value canonical encoding fuzz target (resolves 371ql)

to_canonical_cbor MUST emit Major Type 7 simple values per RFC 8949
§3.3: false → 0xf4, true → 0xf5, null → 0xf6. Existing fcp-cbor
canonical-encoding coverage covers integers, strings, arrays, maps,
floats, tags, schema gates — but NOT simple-value byte-position
anchors. A regression in any of the three head bytes would shift
content addresses for every object containing a Bool or Null.

Five properties driven over a discriminator picking among
{false, true, null} or array-of-simple:
- false → exactly [0xf4]
- true → exactly [0xf5]
- null → exactly [0xf6]
- pairwise injectivity of the three encodings
- ciborium round-trip preserves variant

Once-gated anchors verify exact byte encodings at root + nested inside
Array (head 0x81 followed by simple-value byte) for all three variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -780,5 +780,12 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_cbor_simple_value_canonical"
+path = "fuzz_targets/cbor_simple_value_canonical.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [workspace]
 members = ["."]
